title: Migrating a production AI agent to GPT-5.6: 2.2x faster, 27% cheaper
author: Hacker News (Best)
summary: This post details the migration of a production AI agent from an older model to GPT-5.6, achieving 2.2x faster inference and 27% cost reduction. It shares practical optimization strategies and performance benchmarks, offering valuable insights for teams managing LLM-powered services in production.
